[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010001 2
1 0100111 4
2 0111010 4
3 1100010 3
4 0010000 1
5 0011011 4
6 0110001 3
7 0001000 1

01 10 0010000 1 match 4
12 21 0010001 2 match 0
23 32 0000000 a
34 43 0000000 a
45 54 0100001 2
56 65 0100010 2
67 76 0100010 2
70 07 0000000 a

02 20 0010000 1 match 4
13 31 0001000 1 match 7
24 42 0110001 3 match 6
35 53 0000000 a
46 64 0110000 2
57 75 0100010 2
60 06 0010000 1 match 4
71 17 0000010 1

03 30 0000000 a
14 41 0010001 2 match 0
25 52 0100001 2
36 63 0001000 1 match 7
47 74 0100000 1
50 05 0000000 a
61 16 0011010 3
72 27 0100000 1

04 40 0010000 1 match 4
15 51 0000011 2
26 62 0110000 2
37 73 0000000 a
